TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nakahama_go, title = Nakahama_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nakahama_go} }

S.FORM: Nakahama go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 148.86 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 63 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 26.59 km¬≤), 4,089 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,583 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,601 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 88%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Nakahama go ays psgayun 6 ru 15 alang. 15 alang hani ga, Mornos , Tapowaray śąĖ Saranawan , Ciwkangan , Makrahay , Cidatayay , Ta¬īman , Polo't , Pakara'ac , Pasongan , Kolado't , Carapongay , Sadipongan , Nadan , Cikadaan , Kinanoka .

Nakahama go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 148.86 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 63 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 26.59 km¬≤), 4,089 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,583 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,601 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 88%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Nakahama go ays psgayun 6 ru 15 alang. 15 alang hani ga, Mornos , Tapowaray śąĖ Saranawan , Ciwkangan , Makrahay , Cidatayay , Ta¬īman , Polo't , Pakara'ac , Pasongan , Kolado't , Carapongay , Sadipongan , Nadan , Cikadaan , Kinanoka .
S.PHON: nakańßama …£o mki s~…ēku taituŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na amis~…ē, ő≤unun ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u nakańßama …£o ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, mornos~…ē , tapowaraj * s~…ēaranawan , ¶~ ®iwkaŇčan , makrańßaj , ¶~ ®i*atajaj , ta*man , polo Ēt , pakara Ēa ¶~ ® , pas~…ēoŇčan , kola*o Ēt , ¶~ ®arapoŇčaj , s~…ēa*ipoŇčan , na*an , ¶~ ®ika*aan , kinanoka .
